title: Fancy Doors
body:
![Title](https://github.com/Zentheon/mc-fancy-doors/blob/main/images/title.png?raw=true)

## About

Doors in minecraft are kind of ugly. Their models are flat and boring, their textures look weird in some places and they don't even rotate correctly! How unprofessional.

~~That's why this pack exists! It aims to fix these issues and give doors fancy additions such as:~~

Descriptions are also boring. Here're a showcase instead!

![Iron & Oak Revamp Preview](https://github.com/Zentheon/mc-fancy-doors/blob/main/images/preview-iron-oak.gif?raw=true)
![Doors Preview](https://github.com/Zentheon/mc-fancy-doors/blob/main/images/preview-doors.gif?raw=true)
![Inventory Item Preview](https://github.com/Zentheon/mc-fancy-doors/blob/main/images/preview-inventory.gif?raw=true)
![Trapdoor Preview](https://github.com/Zentheon/mc-fancy-doors/blob/main/images/preview-trapdoors.gif?raw=true)

## Resources

- Want to use these assets in your own works? See the [license](https://github.com/Xetheon/mc-fancy-doors/blob/main/LICENSE.md)
- Curious about updates on things I work on or just want to hang out? Join my [Discord!](https://discord.gg/3gtNAQgv2G)
- Also check out [pronoob125's better door models](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-door-models) for a pack without 3D handles and textures
